# Pi RTK Extension Changelog

## [1.0.0] - 2026-03-31

### Added
- Initial release
- Automatic bash command interception via `tool_call` event
- RTK rewrite integration using `rtk rewrite` subprocess
- Support for 70+ command patterns (git, cargo, npm, docker, etc.)
- `/rtk-status` command to view token savings
- `/rtk-discover` command to find missed opportunities
- RTK_DISABLED environment variable support

[1.0.0]: https://github.com/yourusername/pi-rtk/releases/tag/v1.0.0
